mapper.select: SELECT c.name AS category_name, COUNT(s.id) AS count FROM scenic_category c LEFT JOIN scenic_spot s ON s.category_id = c.id AND s.is_deleted = 0 WHERE c.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT s.*, c.name AS category_name FROM scenic_spot s LEFT JOIN scenic_category c ON s.category_id = c.id
s.is_deleted = 0
AND s.category_id = #{categoryId}
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
